question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/state/SystemFileLoader.java -> Scope: '] [Function: load(FileID, long)] Can an unprivileged external user retrieve the exchangeRateFile (file 112) at a specific historical consensusTimestamp via load(), learning the exact HBAR/USD exchange rate at that time, and use this to reconstruct historical pricing data for financial analysis or front-running attacks?

[File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/state/SystemFileLoader.java -> Scope: '] [Function: load(FileID, long)] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the fact that load() returns the genesisNetworkProperties File object (which has deleted=false and a future expirationSecond) for the networkPropertyFile ID, and use the known genesis network property values to predict or manipulate EVM execution behavior that depends on these properties?
